request_payload.exposure_text: Did you know that our reliance on foreign tech for critical infrastructure is making us vulnerable? Just last year, a small cyber attack on a European ally disrupted their power grid for days. We can't afford to be dependent on others for our security. It's time to invest in homegrown solutions and ensure our strategic autonomy. #NationalSecurity #TechIndependence
